ItacAcademyItem.Name: Segreti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: For more information on the Segreti see Lorenzo Giustiniani, Breve contezza delle accademie istituite nel regno di Napoli, Napoli, 1801.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
